title: Stronger Engagement for Indian Health Needs Act of 2025
short_title: Stronger Engagement for Indian Health Needs Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Indian and Insular Affairs.
subjects: Department of Health and Human Services
Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
crs_summary: Stronger Engagement for Indian Health Needs Act of 2025 This bill elevates the current position of the Director of the Indian Health Service within the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to Assistant Secretary for Indian Health within HHS.
